title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 35.44% and 2.93%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Taking Stock of Home Improvement Retailers Before Earnings
text: Two big-time home improvement retailers, Lowe's and Builders FirstSource, are scheduled to reveal their quarterly results this week. How do they stack up?

title: What Awaits Builders FirstSource (BLDR) This Earnings Season?
text: Softness in the housing and R&R markets is likely to have been reflected in Builders FirstSource's (BLDR) Q4 performance.

title: Should You Buy Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Ahead of Earnings?
text: FirstSource (BLDR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Will Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Builders FirstSource: Don't Be Mesmerized By The Past Few Years' Performance
text: Builders FirstSource, Inc.'s double-digit growth over the past few years was due to acquisitions and one-off high product prices. It is not a high-growth company when these are stripped out. Builders FirstSource is a cyclical company whose performance is tied to Housing Starts. It should be analyzed and valued as a cyclical one.

title: Builders FirstSource: Ready To Sizzle In 2023
text: Builders FirstSource is a profitable business that's cheaply valued. The balance sheet is strong, and the company is buying back its shares.
